message:
feat(interactive): wire model selector overlay into TUI (bd-1xc4)

Integrate ModelSelectorOverlay (Ctrl+L) with full model switching:
- open_model_selector: populates from available_models, guards on idle state
- handle_model_selector_key: Up/Down/j/k/PgUp/PgDown, fuzzy search, Enter/Esc
- apply_model_selection: creates provider, updates agent+session+shared state
- render_model_selector: scrollable list with filter, current model marker (*)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
